Bus Timings

Fujairah to Dubai Bus Timing: Schedule and Routes

June 6, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Whether you’re commuting for work or exploring Dubai’s attractions, understanding the bus schedules and routes ensures a seamless travel experience. Here’s a comprehensive guide to help you plan your journey effectively.

E700 Bus Route Schedule and Details

The E700 bus route operates between Fujairah Bus Station and Union Square Bus Station in Dubai. Here are the general departure timings:

  • First bus from Fujairah: 5:30 AM

  • Last bus from Fujairah: 12:00 AM (midnight, next day)
  • Frequency: Approximately every 90 minutes
  • Travel Time: About 2 hours and 30 minutes, subject to traffic conditions
  • Ticket Price: 25 AED per person
From Fujairah Bus Station From Etisalat Bus Station (Dubai)
05:00 07:00
06:30 08:00
08:00 09:30
09:30 10:40
10:40 12:15
12:15 13:30
13:30 15:00
15:00 16:15
16:15 17:35
17:35 19:00
19:00 20:15
20:30 21:45

Bus E700 Timetable

For the complete timings, you can check at the official website of RTA, or you can visit this link E700 Bus Timings.

Departure Points in Fujairah and Arrival Points in Dubai

Departure points in Fujairah include:

  • Fujairah Bus Station

  • Choithrams Supermarket
  • Fujairah City Centre
  • Etisalat

Arrival points in Dubai may include:

  • Union Square Bus Station

  • Al Ghubaiba Bus Station
  • Ibn Battuta Bus Station

Also See: Fazaa Card: Benefits, Application Process, and More

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Booking Tickets

Tickets for the Fujairah to Dubai bus can be booked in several ways:

  • Online: Through the official websites of bus operators or third-party booking platforms.

  • At the Station: Tickets can also be purchased directly at Fujairah Bus Station or other designated ticket counters.

Read More: Hafilat Recharge Online: Easy Steps to Top Up Your Card

Journey Experience

On a recent trip, a traveler took the E700 bus from Fujairah Bus Station to Etisalat Bus Station in Dubai, enjoying a scenic two-and-a-half-hour journey.

Bus Features and Amenities

The E700 bus is equipped with several features to enhance your travel experience:

  • Air Conditioning: Keeps passengers comfortable during the summer heat.

  • Adjustable Seating: Allows passengers to recline and adjust their seats for comfort.
  • Priority Seating: Specially marked seats for pregnant women, senior citizens, and people with disabilities.
  • Free Wi-Fi: Available for passengers to stay connected during their journey.
  • Onboard Displays: Announce the next stop, helping new passengers navigate their journey.

Tips for Traveling

  • Arrive Early: Arriving at the bus station at least 30 minutes before departure ensures a smooth boarding process.
  • Comfort: Pack essentials for a comfortable journey, including water, snacks, and entertainment for longer trips.

By following this guide, you can effectively plan your journey from Fujairah to Dubai by bus, ensuring a convenient and enjoyable travel experience across the UAE’s Emirates.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 6, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
